name: victory_celebration
description: Uplifting, celebratory music with bright brass and cheerful melody. Perfect for post-race interviews, victory moments, and feel-good endings.
trigger_hints: Play during victory ceremonies, post-race interviews, or happy endings.

sources.title: Upbeat Fun Background Music
sources.author: Music_Unlimited
sources.notes: Cheerful, upbeat track with positive vibes. Duration ~2:24. Good for celebration/interview scenes.
